text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This race will serve as the crucial preliminary
contest before the spring Tenno Sho. And yet,
Tamamo Cross seems antsy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't take her mind off Oguri Cap, who has
dominated several graded races during her time
as a classic-year racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Tamamo Cross a pep talk to get her
focused, and she departs for the race fully
engaged for what's ahead.
